classes.purpose: Frame the case, apply current official guidance, and draft the professional-review practice plan
classes.content: Case facts and local evidence; DIRE or SARI screenshots and OCR; dates and chamber; official-source passages and provenance; proposed classifications, recipient positions, filing steps, questions and review decisions

boundaries_beyond_codex.destination: Public SARI, Registro Imprese, DIRE, chamber, INPS, INAIL, SUAP, and IVASS sources relevant to the case
boundaries_beyond_codex.purpose: Select current official guidance and record its provenance
boundaries_beyond_codex.content: Competent chamber and generic topical query, selected public content ID, public page metadata and official-source URLs; no client identifiers or case narrative
controls: Use generic topical searches without names, tax codes, VAT numbers, contact details, addresses, or case narrative.
Keep the public browser flow read-only and do not export cookies or use login, contact, assistance, upload, or submission routes.
A human selects the relevant SARI content before it is registered.

boundaries_beyond_codex.destination: Exact public SARI host and selected chamber tenant
boundaries_beyond_codex.purpose: Search public metadata and fetch one human-selected SARI card through the conditional connector
boundaries_beyond_codex.content: Generic topical query or selected card ID, tenant and expected chamber; public metadata and card response
controls: Require separate written rights-holder permission and a case-specific network approval; user or studio approval alone is insufficient.
Allow only the exact HTTPS SARI host and path, reject redirects, cap results and bytes, and fetch at most one selected card.
Keep anonymous cookies in memory and never call login, support, upload, or submission routes.

boundaries_beyond_codex.purpose: Download missing OCR model weights before local recognition
boundaries_beyond_codex.content: Model-weight request and approval reference; no case screenshots or extracted case content
controls: Disabled by default and enabled only with both the download flag and a stable approval ID.
Only model weights cross the boundary; screenshot recognition remains local.

security_controls.control: Evidence and generated artifacts remain in an owner-only directory outside the repository.
The workflow never receives authentication material, operates a filing session, signs, pays, contacts support, or submits a practice.
Generated packages remain professional-review drafts and keep ready_to_file false.
